item.title: Another trend that should come to the west
item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: Fun stuff I like! Unrelated to my usual stuff! (Data use warning)
item.description:
Check your wifi. It's alllllll videos. Yeah so. None of this is new or novel but I love these videos, and wanted them all in one place. And then it's like...I have 39 of them so I'll keep an eye out for more. And then I hit 50 and said fuck it, make it public. People like them or they wouldn't show up periodically, and maybe the kinds of people who like the first few haven't seen the last few. Also I like those sweet internet points and maybe this scratch that itch. No dishonesty about my intentions.
Classic. Here's the source because I actually know it. https://youtu.be/U9t-slLl30E?si=I7ISlsjQV9syyR_v
Quack. Love the "THWAP" of the ice cream.
Hard to pick a last video. This is gonna be my day.
Ok. Hope yall enjoyed it. Can't think, have seaguls in my ears now. If you like stuff, just fucking enjoy it. Like, don't apologize for your niche hobbies and podcasts and books. Get your joy where you can, and don't be ashamed to tell people you like it and why! Here's the archive link. If you're new to my profile and posts, be warned they are not all clean like this. Most are NSFW. May your way be Green and Golden. https://imgur.com/a/vhx2cjG
item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.title: Dumps of Unusual Size 40: Science, Part One
item.description:
I am the opposite of this. I've been through too may tornado events. Earthquakes may be bad and aftershocks are disturbing, but tornadoes make U-turns to go back for buildings they missed. Especially trailer parks. I remember several years ago when the first tornado I heard about in California and it of course hit a trailer park outside of West Sacramento.
This one is for the geologists out there. This picture is a real picture that has been cartoonified for examples of glacial features. Unfortunately, I haven't been able to find the cartoon example.
item.dc:creator: Schadwen

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.31 LATE NIGHT FEELINGS
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Yuanbin Hu LeBlanc
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Late Night Feelings - Mark Ronson feat. Lykke Li YouTube: https://youtu.be/OpNJTr7q1LM?si=drxkbsGt3ooba3Sw Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/7aQeWViSfRWSEwtJD86Eq0?si=b59e83bb70b84eb8

Alex Alenseenko
Luye Liang Shanzhong
Wenjun Lin
Filipe Pagliuso
Emilyena Strange
Sergey Chernigin
Ismail Inceoglu
Inhyuk Lee
Joao Marcello
Emilyena Strange
Veronika Kozlova
Mam Ba
TONTON REVOLVER
Robin Li
Jun Kim
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.title: Some more memes to battle the bots/spam
item.description:
Some of us are trying to procrastinate instead of work, damnit! So here are some stuff I sent my ex-"it's complicated" partner. All reposts, sorry.
(not sure if this is real or satire, but funny nevertheless.)
Hope you (continue to) have a good day. Feel free to share any advice for writer's block!

item.title: Images of Note: Momma was a techical
item.description:
IT GOES DEEP
Elbow Deep in a Herse sounds like a rejected name for My Chemical Romance
It is very disgusting, they should kiss about it. Also you can tell the OG "Artist" was American because they imply Americans know more about European-ness than Europeans.
yeah :c
Honey I think you might be a little sapphic
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!

item.title: click, click
item.dc:creator: sharirus

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1320 (bank of fear)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I also have a dinosaur on my shoulder currently.
The reason: Atlantic currents such as the Gulf Stream help keep Europe warmer than it should be for its latitude. When/as they start failing... it gets colder.
Tezcatlipoca lives for the drama.
Yeah. This. I assume any flirtatious action I offer is unwanted attention, and unwanted attention is harassment or can be construed as such... so I just don't bother anymore. On the bright side, I've also been able to basically end the yearning for a partner and am now almost completely apathetic about this. I don't care much anymore about finding a partner for the end of the world: I'm more interested in building up my support network of friends and allies for the probable collapse of the American state so we can live our lives and have a cozy catastrophe.
Hahaha if you've ever been in a heavily ethnic Orthodox or Catholic parish, you know how this is true
Oh this is brilliant.
This is one of the most esoteric memes I've ever seen and I love it.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "gruhp." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: How Emergency Fake Flowers Help Save Bees
item.description: Fearing for a declining bee population and collapsing insect colonies, Matilde Boelhouwer of the Netherlands put her design degree to creative use. The Dutch artist designed 3D printed, eco-friendly artificial flowers to help feed bees, butterflies and other insects facing a shrinking supply of food in urban environments.

item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: I'm really f'ing tired.
item.description:
I'm on FMLA now when needed so I can care for them. I'm also out of leave. At least Dad can very easily afford to cover my lost wages so I can care for my family and him. If you missed my last post, he has bladder cancer from Agent Orange exposure in Vietnam from 1967-1968. He served with the 84th Engineer Battalion and was in the middle of Tet '68.
Oh, joy. For a man who works as hard as he does even at 76, this is going to be a kick in the ass for him. He won't be able to do shit now, at least for a while.
He is likely going to enroll in a study that gives him a small chance of keeping the bladder. So there is that. Another small blessing - the chemo he needs is apparently well tolerated and all that. Hoping for the best.
Super stressed is all. Wishing my brother was still alive to help, but cancer took him over a decade ago. At least as a teacher, I'll be off over the summer to help out without having to worry about missing work. Thanks to everyone in my last post for the support. Fuck you, cancer.
My big, bad, Vietnam Veteran father. (Looks good for 76, don't he?) His life is ruled by an 8 pound dog named Daphne. Love you Dad.
item.dc:creator: Loctavius
